title: phyllanthus stipulatus
intro: Phyllanthus stipulatus, commonly known as the 'Sudarshan Chakra', is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its numerous health benefits, including its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function.
